{{Infobox artifact
| name = Greatfather’s tears
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather]]'s tears is a spring located at the summit of the [[Greatfather]] mountain, which features a peak shaped like a bottle mouth. This location is characterized by constant storms and serves as the source for the [[Dragon River]]. The spring contains a powerful [[water aura]] that allows certain [[Holy Wind School]] elders to use its pool for the regeneration of their physical and spiritual vitality. While the [[water]] can restore a person's [[spirit]] and body, it is also described as being physically harsh, capable of scouring the skin like a frozen blade. [[Consuming]] the liquid can also induce intense, multi-day trances that significantly increase the density and strength of an individual's [[spirit]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather’s tears]] is a spring that bubbles at the top of the mountain known as the [[Greatfather]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|One handful of [[Greatfather’s tears]] [[water]] restores an aching body and flagging [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Two handfuls of [[Greatfather’s tears]] [[water]] can induce a three-day [[cycling]] trance that imparts density and potency to the [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather’s tears]] [[water]] can scour skin like a frozen blade but leave it youthful and supple.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Greatfather’s tears{{!}}Greatfather’s Tears]] is a pool at the top of [[Greatfather]] where favored [[Holy Wind]] elders can bathe to regenerate vitality.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
